description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle, visually resembling the AK-47, with a robust and utilitarian design. It features a fixed wooden or polymer stock, a curved detachable magazine, and a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post. The receiver and handguard are solid and angular, with a prominent trigger guard and a charging handle on the right side. The rifle's surface appears matte with a muted, purplish-gray coloration, and the overall construction suggests a combination of metal and synthetic materials. The magazine is distinctly curved, and the iron sights are integrated into the top of the barrel and receiver.
description: A classic assault rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and matte purplish-gray finish, featuring iron sights and a robust, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, receiver, and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine curve, trigger guard, and barrel details.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the stock, magazine, and barrel alignment.
